##NAMES=Rewitzerite
##RRUFFID=R250044
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=K(H_2_O)Mn_2_(Al_2_Ti)(PO_4_)_4_[O(OH)](H_2_O)_10_·4H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Hagendorf-Süd pegmatite, Oberpfalz, Bavaria, Germany
##OWNER=Natural History Museum of Los Angeles County
##SOURCE=Tony Kampf
##DESCRIPTION=Clusters of elongated hexagonal-shaped colorless prisms associated with rockbridgeite. Type sample from Grey et al (2023)
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R250044
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=[K_0.77_(H_2_O)_0.23_][H_2_O](Mn^2+^_0.82_Mg_0.64_Fe^3+^_0.43_[box]_0.11_)(Al_1.51_Ti^4+^_1.06_Fe^3+^_0.43_)(PO_4_)_4_[(OH)_0.54_F_0.42_O_1.04_](H_2_O)_10_·4H_2_O
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder
